briefs.title: Council to Consider Liquor Licence Application for 102-6462 Kingsway, Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council will consider a liquor licence application (LLA 25-12) for a business at Unit 102-6462 Kingsway. A planning sketch has been prepared, but no decision has been made yet.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — this could affect nearby businesses or your own licence application.
